title: Solar flares
script_summary: Exploring the science behind solar flares and their effects on Earth.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about solar flares than social media does.
Solar flares are massive bursts of energy from the sun. They can impact communication and power on Earth.
But did you know they’re caused by magnetic field lines snapping? This can release the energy of millions of atomic bombs.
When these flares erupt, they can send bursts of solar particles towards Earth, affecting satellites.
They can create stunning auroras, but also disrupt power grids, leading to blackouts. It’s a cosmic balancing act!
Curious about more cosmic wonders? Follow for the latest in space science!
